prompt:
Final lifestyle 4 — a photorealistic 1:1 lifestyle photograph: a fit warm-skinned man in his early 30s sitting at a sunlit modern home-office desk by a tall window, mid-afternoon, in BRIGHT CLEAN DIRECT NATURAL DAYLIGHT pouring through the window on the left side of the frame. He leans back casually in a wooden Eames-style chair, lifting ONE dark sugar-dusted sea moss gummy CUBE between his thumb and index finger toward his parted lips with a relaxed half-smile, mid-bite. He wears a fitted soft sage henley, round glasses, brown stubble, hair tousled, sun-warmed glowing skin.

>>> THE JAR — REALISTIC SCALE + CLEAN LIGHT BOUNCE <<<
A small realistic-sized Dialed Sea Moss Gummies jar (real supplement-bottle scale — roughly the size of a coffee mug, NOT oversized) sits on the warm-wood desk in front of him in the SAME bright direct daylight. SHARP CLEAN SPECULAR HIGHLIGHT — a bright vertical gleam — runs down the curved side of the jar's glossy black plastic. The jar's front label catches the light fully and CRISPLY — every teal/cyan and gold/yellow brand detail reads sharply. The label IS the brightest cleanly-lit element on the desk. Beside the jar a small ceramic dish holds 5-6 dark sugar-dusted gummy CUBES, and a soft-focus open laptop sits behind the jar. The jar must match the provided reference image — black plastic, teal/cyan + gold accents, front label fully legible, 'MsB° Mineral Support Blend' side panel, lid off.

Background: a softly out-of-focus bright modern home-office — a small snake-plant in a ceramic pot, a stack of two hardcover books, soft white walls, warm-wood desk surface, the tall window pouring in bright open daylight. Bright airy real-photograph feel.

Lighting: BRIGHT CLEAN OPEN DAYLIGHT from the left wrapping BOTH the jar AND the man uniformly — same crisp daylight bouncing cleanly off skin and glossy plastic. NO heavy shadows, NO orange tint, NO mood.

Framing: square 1:1, three-quarter view of the man at his desk, gummy in the upper-third near his face, small realistic-sized jar in the lower-third with clear specular gleam.

Style: hyper-realistic photography, 50mm look, f/2.0 shallow depth, natural unretouched skin texture and stubble, sharp focus on jar with clean reflections, no AI artifacts.
